title: Grok新增Imagine图像视频搜索
full_text:
ICYMI 👀: Users can now search for @imagine images and videos on Grok!
It works like a proper image search but scoped to your Imagine creations. I wish we have it across the whole set of published Grok images eventually - that would be huge! https://t.co/NUgPVd1qWp
